steps.title: Use the station context
steps.content: Noguchi's father is at the station looking among other people for his son after eleven years apart. Because he cannot recognize Noguchi easily, the word find describes trying to spot someone in a crowd.

steps.title: Reject the wrong meanings
steps.content: Choice A means to damage someone's reputation. Choice B means to disclose something hidden. Choice C means to influence something. None fits a father searching among people at a station. The answer is D.
